notes: Master-Reorg SHIP R-2c — fold the last two Phase-0.5 strands (redesign-only, legacy byte-identical). (1) LOG NOTE (rack-scoped) was STRANDED under the redesign: stripeRack_logNote's only door was the legacy #action-stripe rack toolbar, which is display:none under body.rd (L8895) — so on the default UI a tech viewing a rack had no way to log a note. FIX: added a redesign-gated 'LOG NOTE' button to the redesign rack detail (deploy_showRackDetail), right below the ASSIGN/QR row, onclick=stripeRack_logNote(deployId,rackId). It's the natural rack-scoped home; the note lands in the same audit trail the Handoff report reads (so it IS the 'LOG NOTE → Handoff flow' fold). Of the three legacy stripe toolbar actions, LOG NOTE was the ONLY stranded one — QR already has a redesign door in the rack detail (deploy_generateRackQR @28529) and HANDOFF is reachable from the deploy detail + Work HANDOFF card. Gated if(redesign_isOn()) so ?legacy=1 is byte-identical (legacy keeps its #action-stripe LOG NOTE, untouched). (2) PHASE WORK: NO CODE NEEDED — recon proved it's a non-issue. The literal 'phase work' appears ONLY as legacy pg-triage NBA copy (L18841, 'Continue current phase work…'); there is no distinct 'Phase Work' surface. The actual per-phase work already lives in the redesign Deploy detail (PHASE PIPELINE) + rack detail (per-phase rack phases). Marked RESOLVED-BY-EXISTING in PHASE0-CENSUS.md. With this, all Phase-0.5 strands are resolved or folded into reorg destinations (pg-master .167 · Deploy Optics→R-2 detail · pg-twin→wk-issues · LOG NOTE→here · Phase Work→already-in-detail · Crash-Cart Mode owner-killed→RETIRED). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, clear SW cache first): open a deployment → a rack → a full-width 'LOG NOTE' button shows below ASSIGN/QR; tapping it opens the Log-Note-to-<rack> prompt; the note saves to the audit trail and shows in the deployment HISTORY / feeds the handoff; ?legacy=1 identical (legacy rack detail unchanged; its #action-stripe LOG NOTE still works). ROLLBACK: revert the commit. NOTE: cork now 6 deep — John owes device-verify of .167/.168/.169/.170/.171/.172 (all on faith). Remaining reorg: Ship B (router-gating, PARKED, sign-off req) · R-3 (PLATFORMS rebuild — Blast Radius lands there) · R1 deletion pass (after Ship B verified).
